MIL was registered as a non-systematically important non-banking finance company not accepting pubic deposit. However, its NBFC Registration was cancelled by the Reserve Bank of India on July 18, 2018 due to non-attainment of Net Operating Funds. The company has surrendered its Certificate of registration on January 18, 2019. In future, the company wishes to apply for fresh certificate of registration after attainment of Net Operating
Fund.
